allow_instructions: This is a personal Astro portfolio repo. Dev server, builds, installs, linters, extension installs, and read-only inspection are fine without asking.
Shell commands that only read files, run tests, or start local dev servers should run automatically.
MCP tools for Figma and Webflow in this project are trusted.
block_instructions: Ask before git push, force push, or any destructive delete (rm -rf).
Ask before editing or committing secrets in .env or credential files.
